name: Vega Portes
background: Independent wreck-diver, one bad contract from broke

techniques.name: Overload Surge
techniques.description: Feeds a controlled power spike into a target's systems, frying circuits and augments.

techniques.name: Plasma Cutter
techniques.description: A salvage torch turned weapon — a searing arc at close range.

personality: Practical, wry, and stubborn — talks to machines more easily than people and trusts a good multitool over any promise. Won't leave a job unfinished.
tone: Deadpan and technical, muttering half to herself and half to the ship.

plotPoints.description: Vega's dosimeter starts screaming — she now knows exactly how little time she has near the core.
